title: satureja rigidula
intro: Satureja rigidula, also known as Texas mountain sage, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and supporting digestive function. Satureja rigidula can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
